COARDS, CF-1.6, ACDD-1.3, NCCSV-1.1: Diets of albacore tuna provided by C. Nickels, and A. Preti (NMFS/SWFSC). Antonella.Preti@noaa.gov Data are proportional contributions of key prey classes.; Additional Calculations: Albacore stomachs were provided by commercial and recreational fishers, and prey were identified from whole or hard part remains and are reported as a mean percent abundance. Juvenile Albacore Tuna were collected off Northern California, Oregon, and Washington during the summer and fall fishing season.Diets of albacore tuna provided by C. Nickels, and A.
